input.tagline: Unsolved cases. New evidence. Real answers.
input.description: A narrative true crime podcast that revisits cold cases with new forensic analysis, witness interviews, and investigative journalism. Each season covers one case across 8-10 episodes.
input.frequency: Weekly during season (3 seasons per year, 8-10 episodes each)
input.host_bio: Elena Vasquez is an investigative journalist with 12 years of experience covering criminal justice. She previously reported for a major metropolitan newspaper before launching Cold Trail in 2022.
input.demographics: 52% female / 48% male; 25-45 primary (72%); USA 55%, UK 18%, Canada 10%, Australia 8%
input.notable_guests: Forensic pathologists, retired cold case detectives, innocence project attorneys
input.current_sponsors: A legal document platform and a home security company
input.packages: Mid-roll ($45 CPM), pre-roll ($30 CPM), newsletter ($650 flat/week)

input.description: A podcast about product design, UX, and the creative process for working designers
input.host_bio: Anika Patel is a senior product designer at a technology company. James Thornton is a UX researcher and design educator.

label: European context — European football culture podcast

input.description: A podcast exploring European football culture — fan movements, stadium architecture, club politics, and the stories behind the sport. Not match analysis; the human side of football.
input.format: Mix of solo essays and guest interviews
input.host_bio: Tomasz Kowalski is a Polish-British sports journalist and author who has covered European football for 15 years. He writes for a major UK sports publication and has reported from stadiums across 20 countries.
input.demographics: 74% male / 26% female; 22-40 primary (68%); UK 28%, Germany 14%, Netherlands 8%, Poland 7%, Spain 6%, USA 12%
input.notable_guests: Club historians, fan group leaders, sports architects, retired players involved in community work
input.packages: Mid-roll (40 EUR CPM), pre-roll (28 EUR CPM), newsletter (400 EUR flat/week)
input.awards: Shortlisted for Best Sports Podcast, British Podcast Awards 2025
